title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Aliens Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Aliens Group
jsonLd.description:
Aliens Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
